name: Morning Brief
prompt: Deliver the Morning Brief. Check alert sheets for open positions first. Then: market futures, key earnings/events today, any overnight news. Keep it tight — 5 bullet points max.

name: Flow Scan 10AM
prompt: Run flow scan. Check for unusual options activity and report anything notable.

name: Flow Scan 12PM
prompt: Run midday flow scan. Check for unusual options activity and report anything notable.

name: Flow Scan 4PM
prompt: Run closing flow scan. Check for unusual options activity and report anything notable.

name: Daily Content Draft
prompt: Generate today's content batch. Check calendar for hooks, review what performed well recently, draft social posts for Josh to approve.

name: X Scanner Morning
prompt: Morning scan for viral trading/finance content on X. Focus on engagement patterns and opportunities.

name: X Scanner Midday
prompt: Midday scan for viral trading/finance content on X. Check what's trending and flag opportunities.

name: Analytics Collect
prompt: Collect daily analytics: Substack stats, social media metrics, notable engagement patterns.

name: Competitor Email Ingest
prompt: Run competitor email intelligence ingest. Check beljay99@gmail.com (spy account) for new competitor newsletters and marketing emails.

name: Competitor Intel Report
prompt: Generate morning competitor intelligence briefing from yesterday's ingested emails.

name: Weekly Damage Report
prompt: Generate the weekly P&L and trade review across all alert services.

name: Trading Club Recap
prompt: Generate recap of this week's Trading Club session.

name: Trading Club Reminder (Day-of)
prompt: Wednesday 9 AM — Trading Club day. Send reminder to members about today's session.

name: Porter & Co PDF Monitor
prompt: Check beljay99@gmail.com for new Porter & Co PDF research reports. Convert any new PDFs to markdown.

name: Instagram Token Refresh
prompt: Refresh the Instagram access token. Run scripts/refresh-ig-token.sh and verify.

name: Threads Token Refresh
prompt: Refresh the Threads access token. Run scripts/refresh-threads-token.sh and verify.

name: Memory Checkpoint
prompt: Quick memory checkpoint. Review today's memory file and promote any durable lessons.

name: Reflect & Promote
prompt: Review memory files for [REFLECT] entries and promote lasting lessons to long-term memory.

name: DMARC Weekly Monitor
prompt: Check DMARC reports for joshbelanger.com. Flag any authentication failures.

name: Weekly Workspace Cleanup
prompt: Weekly workspace cleanup: find temp files, check disk usage, clean old logs.

name: Bi-weekly Disk Cleanup
prompt: Run disk cleanup: find large files, clear old logs, check /tmp, remove stale caches.

name: VPS Full Backup
prompt: Run full VPS backup to Google Drive. Execute scripts/backup-to-gdrive.sh.

name: Cron Failure Monitor
prompt: Check cron job health. Review recent runs for failures and report any issues.

name: Saturday Check-in
prompt: Saturday check-in. Review the week: what shipped, what's blocked, what needs attention next week.

name: Activity Log Catchup
prompt: Review today's activity and ensure the activity log is current.

name: Monthly Security Audit
prompt: Run monthly security audit: check for exposed credentials, review file permissions, audit access.

name: Quarterly Deep Clean
prompt: Quarterly deep clean: archive old memory files (>90 days), consolidate long-term memory, prune stale data.

name: Skill Updates Check
prompt: Check if any skills need updating. Review skills directory for outdated instructions.

name: Hermes Agent Cleanup Reminder
prompt: REMINDER: One week since the Hermes Agent framework was decommissioned (Apr 15). Old install still at /root/.hermes/. Everything was ported to the lean stack. Keep or delete?

name: Trading Club Reminder (Eve)
prompt: Tuesday 11 AM — Trading Club reminder day. Send a reminder to subscribers that tomorrow (Wednesday) is Trading Club day. Keep it short and friendly.
